title: Walk-in Drive Real Estate Agent at Gera Developments

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Real Estate Agent at Gera Developments
jsonLd.description:
Gera Developments, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Visakhapatnam operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Gera Developments:
Gera Developments is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gera Developments!
